title: Benok
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Benok1.jpg]] |name=Benok |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3951 BBY]], [[Telos IV]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Exchange]] ([[Bumani Exchange Corporation]]) |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Perhaps you don't know who I am?''"
"''Someone with an overinflated opinion of himself?|Benok and Meetra Surik|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} '''Benok''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], and chief of security for [[Loppak Slusk]], head of operations for the [[Exchange]] on [[Citadel Station]] over [[Telos IV]]. ==Biography== [[File:Benokblaster.png|left|thumb|Benok's blaster]] Making the most of his master dueling skills and giving every job his fullest attention, Benok worked his way quickly up the ladder of the [[Exchange]] on [[Citadel Station]] to become [[Loppak Slusk|Slusk's]] enforcer, impressing Slusk with his skill and attitude. He was cold, calculating, and arrogant, and was feared by opponents of the Exchange. Skillful with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], his own henchmen included [[Matu]] and [[Nahata]], two of the best and most ruthless Exchange thugs on Telos. Benok was highly praised on the Citadel Station for his [[Dueling|Master Dueling]] ability. Benok, while on Telos, threatened [[Meetra Surik]] in the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] only to be killed by her later as she [[Skirmishes on Citadel Station|stormed]] the Exchange offices. Wearing [[reinforced fiber armor]] for protection, Benok also had a [[Benok's blaster|custom blaster pistol]] with an additional ion cell, which Surik may have taken from Benok's body as a trophy after he was killed. The ion cell allowed it to deal damage to droids. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Benok |es=Benok |fr=Benok }} [[Category:Exchange members]] [[Category:Guards]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Telosians]]
